name: Encharge Email Automation API
what_it_does: Email marketing automation platform with REST API built for SaaS businesses — sending behavior-triggered emails based on user actions, managing subscriber segments and tags, and running onboarding/lifecycle email flows with native CRM integrations.
use_cases: Triggering behavioral emails when users perform actions (signed up, upgraded, churned) via Events API
Managing subscriber tags and segments programmatically for targeted email flows
Syncing user data from product database to Encharge for lifecycle email automation
Running onboarding drip sequences triggered by API events
Integrating Encharge with CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive) for combined email + CRM automation
not_for: High-volume transactional email (password resets, receipts) — use Postmark or SendGrid
Large-scale email marketing to non-SaaS audiences (use Klaviyo or Mailchimp)
Teams needing complex multi-channel beyond email (use Braze or Customer.io)
best_when: A B2B SaaS team needs behavior-triggered lifecycle email automation with native SaaS product integrations and affordable pricing for growing user bases.
avoid_when: You need transactional email, high-volume marketing, or multi-channel (SMS, push) automation.

auth.notes: API key from account settings. Bearer token in Authorization header. Account-scoped access. No fine-grained scopes. Single API key per account.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $49/month (2,000 subscribers); Growth and Enterprise higher
pricing.notes: No free tier — subscriber-based pricing. Focus on SaaS lifecycle email. European company (Cyprus) with GDPR compliance. Competitive with Customer.io for SaaS use cases at lower price point. Native integrations with Stripe, Segment, HubSpot.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply per plan; contact for specifics

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for people (subscribers), tags, events, and flows. Event API for behavioral triggers. Webhook support for email events (opens, clicks, unsubscribes). Smaller API surface than Customer.io. Documentation adequate but not comprehensive.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Person creation upsert-style by email. Tag additions idempotent. Event tracking creates new event records. Flow enrollment idempotent per person per flow.
known_agent_gotchas: Domain verification required before sending — setup agents cannot automate this
API documentation less comprehensive than Customer.io or Braze
Rate limits not publicly documented — contact support for specifics
Flow enrollment via API requires flow to be in active state

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — EU company (Cyprus). EU data residency. API key auth. Domain verification prevents email abuse. No formal certifications published. Smaller company without SOC2 (GDPR focused).
